'''''Star Wars: Starfighter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was a strategy book for [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] by [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] and was released on [[February 21]], [[2001]].

The guide detailed coverage of the game. It contained detailed maps, including every pilot and their ship to assist you throughout the game. Also included were comprehensive dogfighting techniques for exploiting weaknesses.

{{Book-stub}}
